changes: Promoted tested v9.5 beta build into index.html
Advanced active development sandbox to phoenix_v10_dev.html
Added trip summary panel and trip snapshot capture
Added fine-trim governor and AVR nudge controls
Added lower-load control for overcurrent recovery
Hardened overcurrent drill with 3.0 s stable dwell requirement
Hardened failure semantics for timeout and trip outcomes
Added drill-specific blocker guidance during active scenarios
validated_behaviors: State machine and start functions present
Sync-gating timers present in state and physics loop
Trip snapshot captures dv, df, dphi, current, faults, and scenarioId
All scenarios define armCondition, injectCondition, successCondition, and failureCondition
Overcurrent injects only after breaker closure
Overcurrent success requires injection plus stable current below 1400 A for 3.0 s
Scope-status element and scenario-state panel elements are present
Failure semantics distinguish SUCCESS, FAILED — TIMEOUT, and FAILED — TRIP
Live public beta runtime promoted into index.html
remaining_risks: Public beta may expose scenario edge cases not found in manual validation
Mobile readability should continue to be verified across devices
Guidance wording may still need refinement from real tester feedback
Post-beta hardening may still be required before stable release candidate
notes: v9.5 promoted into index.html as the public beta runtime. Future non-shipped work continues in phoenix_v10_dev.html.
